name: Winter's Bite: The Midnight Blizzard Breach
description:
Challenge: Winter's Bite - The Midnight Blizzard Breach

Background:

The SOC has declared a critical incident. An Advanced Persistent Threat (APT) group, identified as the notorious Midnight Blizzard (APT29/Nobelium), has orchestrated a highly sophisticated, multi-stage attack against our hybrid corporate network.

The Scenario:

The adversary employed a deadly combination of vectors to compromise our infrastructure. The intrusion began with a deceptive spear-phishing campaign delivering malicious RDP attachments, coupled with the targeted exploitation of our public-facing Zimbra mail server (CVE-2022-27924). Once a foothold was established, the attackers moved swiftly and silently.

The network logs reveal a textbook APT escalation: relentless password spraying, MFA fatigue (prompt bombing), and LSASS memory dumping via ProcDump to harvest credentials. They didn't stop at our on-premises active directory; the threat actors successfully pivoted to our Azure AD tenant by stealing application tokens and enrolling rogue devices for persistence.

Using Cobalt Strike beacons, Tor networks, and malicious domains mimicking Microsoft services for Command and Control (C2), they escalated privileges using the PrintNightmare vulnerability, cleared security event logs to cover their tracks, and ultimately exfiltrated massive amounts of sensitive data to unauthorized cloud storage.

Your Mission:

As the lead Incident Responder, you are provided with a comprehensive JSON file containing the raw security alerts from the breach. Your objective is to:

  • Trace the complete kill chain from Initial Access to Exfiltration.
  • Identify the specific vulnerabilities, malware (like Sibot), and C2 infrastructure utilized.
  • Differentiate between true positive indicators of compromise and benign false positives.
  • Document the timeline of the attacker's lateral movement and cloud tenant compromise.

The storm is here. Can you piece together the digital evidence and uncover the full extent of the Midnight Blizzard compromise before the trail freezes over?
